seo.title: Rack Math | Barbell Plate Calculator & Workout Tracker
seo.description: Rack Math helps lifters calculate barbell plates, follow workouts, import programs, log sets, and track PRs from a fast mobile-first app.

hero.eyebrow: Barbell plate calculator and workout tracker
hero.headline: Load the right plates. Track every set.
hero.body: Rack Math turns planned lifts into clear plate math, workout sessions, PRs, and progress insights, so you can stay focused under the bar.

features.title: Plate math without the pause
features.body: Enter the target weight and Rack Math shows the plates to load on each side, with support for custom plates and units.

features.title: Workouts that move with you
features.body: Run sessions, complete sets, adjust loads, and keep your training day organized from your phone.

features.title: Progress you can actually review
features.body: Track history, PRs, muscle volume, and workout consistency so your training data stays useful after the lift.

workflow: Enter a lift, weight, reps, and sets.
See the exact plates to load for each set.
Complete the workout and save your history.
Review progress, PRs, and training patterns.

premium.headline: Built for serious training weeks
premium.body: Upgrade when you want imported programs, cloud sync, deeper tracking, and a smoother path from plan to completed workout.

faq.question: Is Rack Math free?
faq.answer: Yes. The core plate calculator is designed to be fast and useful before you ever upgrade.

faq.question: Does it work on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes. Rack Math is mobile-first and can be installed from supported browsers for quick gym access.

faq.question: Can I use pounds and kilograms?
faq.answer: Yes. Rack Math supports common barbell and plate setups for lb and kg training.

faq.question: Can I track full workouts?
faq.answer: Yes. Rack Math can log sets, preserve workout history, and help you review progress over time.

finalCta.headline: Spend less time doing plate math.
finalCta.body: Open Rack Math and get your next set loaded.
